name: Figma status → Notion task/check-in
description: When a Figma file or frame is marked Ready for Review, create/attach a Notion Task and optional Check-in with the correct reviewer/owner. Posts a Slack note with the Figma link and thumbnail.
steps: Trigger: Figma webhook for file_version/update or comment added with tag Ready for Review.
Get file metadata + frame thumbnail (Figma API get file nodes).
Router: map Team/Project to Notion Role/Goal/Task Type.
Create or update Notion Task in the Tasks data source (data_source_id from echohr-install-state.json).
If a Check-in exists for the employee/goal this week, attach the Task; otherwise create a new Check-in entry dated this week.
Post Slack message with: title, status, owner, Notion links, Figma link, and thumbnail.
Log run in Automation Log with Workflow=Review Summary.
